ORDER ON DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S VERIFIED COMPLAINT BY DEFENDANTS BRANDO EMPIRE SAN FRANCISCO, LLC, BRANDY HO AND JIMMY KWOK LUNG LAM (LEAVE TO AMEND)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS BRANDO EMPIRE SAN FRANCISCO, LLC, BRANDY HO AND JIMMY LAM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION AND SUSTAINED WITH FIFTEEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION. THE FIRST AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE ADEQUATELY PLED. THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FAILS TO ALLEGE THAT HO AND LAM HAVE AN OWNERSHIP INTEREST IN THE CORPORATION. PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE, IF IT CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, SUFFICIENT FACTS TO CURE THIS DEFECT. THE COURT DECLINES TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE DOCUMENTS SOUGHT TO BE JUDICIALLY NOTICED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS BRANDO EMPIRE SAN FRANCISCO, LLC, BRANDY HO AND JIMMY LAM'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. FOR THE FIRST AND SIXTH CAUSES OF ACTION, THE NATURE OF EACH CONTRACT MAY BE ASCERTAINED BY THE ALLEGATIONS. FOR THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION, THOUGH "ALTER EGO LIABILITY" IS NOT A DISTINCT CAUSE OF ACTION, THESE ALLEGATIONS ARE CONSTRUED TO BE PART OF THE GENERAL PLEADINGS AGAINST DEFENDANTS HO AND LAM. DEFENDANTS TO FILE AN ANSWER IN 20 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

Off Calendar Oct-29-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Re Plaintiff'S Deposition Notices
Off Calendar Oct-29-2012 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William Fiske, Esq. of Horner & Singer, Tel. 925.943.6570, for defendants and moving party via court call;
William W. Farrer, Esq. of the Law Office of William W. Farrer, Tel. 415.578.2102, for plaintiff and opposing party.

The court did not allow arguments on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: DEFENDANTs BRANDO EMPIRE SAN FRANCISCO, LLC, BRANDY HO and JIMMY LAM'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Denied. The motion to strike is moot in view of the court's ruling on the Demurrer. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William Fiske, Esq. of Horner & Singer, Tel. 925.943.6570, for defendants and moving party via court call;
William W. Farrer, Esq. of the Law Office of William W. Farrer, Tel. 415.578.2102, for plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BRANDO EMPIRE SAN FRANCISCO, LLC, BRANDY HO and JIMMY LAM'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled. For the first and sixth causes of action, the nature of each contract may be ascertained by the allegations. For the third cause of action, though "Alter Ego Liability" is not a distinct cause of action, these allegations are construed to be part of the general pleadings against Defendants Ho and Lam. Defendants to file an answer in 20 days. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Continued To Nov-01-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BRANDO EMPIRE SAN FRANCISCO, LLC, BRANDY HO and JIMMY LAM'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued to November 1, 2012 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give Defendants the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6C. Defendants must deliver a courtesy copy of the First Amended Complaint with a cover letter stating the new hearing date to Department 302 no later than October 24 at 4pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Continued To Nov-01-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BRANDO EMPIRE SAN FRANCISCO, LLC, BRANDY HO and JIMMY LAM's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued to November 1, 2012 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give Defendants the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6C. Defendants must deliver a courtesy copy of the First Amended Complaint with a cover letter stating the new hearing date to Department 302 no later than October 24 at 4pm or the motion will be overruled. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. WILLIAM WEBB FARRER, TEL. NO. 578-2102 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. WILLIAM FISKE OF HORNER & SINGER LLP, TEL. NO. (925) 943-6570 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS BY TELEPHOE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BRANDO EMPIRE SAN FRANCISCO, LLC, BRANDY HO AND JIMMY LAM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled as to the first and fourth causes of action and sustained with fifteen days leave to amend as to the third cause of action. The first and fourth causes of action are adequately pled. The third cause of action fails to allege that Ho and Lam have an ownership interest in the corporation. Plaintiff is granted leave to amend to allege, if it can do so in good faith, sufficient facts to cure this defect. The Court declines to take judicial notice of the documents sought to be judicially noticed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)
